title: rubus × devius
intro: Rubus × devius, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or black raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a hybrid of the American black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the Himalayan black raspberry (Rubus procerus). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × devius include its potential to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and even show promise in fighting certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Rubus × devius can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
